FieldType.description: Sprint-06 ships these five. Sprint 13 will extend.
FieldType.title: FieldType

ReportContent.description: The full content_jsonb body for one version.
ReportContent.title: ReportContent

SectionLabel.description:
Human-readable, localized title for one report section.

Templates are per-language (a template row is either ``uk`` or ``en``),
so the section ``name`` is a single string in the template's own
language. We mirror it into BOTH ``uk`` and ``en`` here — the same
behaviour the frontend's ``toStudioTemplate`` uses — so the SPA/PDF can
render section titles without re-fetching the template, and historical
reports carry their labels even if the template later changes.
SectionLabel.title: SectionLabel

TemplateDefinition.description:
Full template definition. Stored as ``templates.schema_jsonb``.

The top-level ``code`` + ``language`` pair is the human-readable
identifier; the row's UUID is the system identifier. Sprint 8
reports persist the UUID + ``schema_version`` at finalization.
TemplateDefinition.title: TemplateDefinition

TemplateMetadata.description: Optional metadata. Sprint-17 FHIR / Composition emission reads these.
TemplateMetadata.title: TemplateMetadata

TemplateSection.description:
One section of a template. Each section is dictated separately
in sprint-06 section-aware mode.
TemplateSection.title: TemplateSection
